name: BEN_VALD_RPT_TYP
description: BEN_VALD_RPT_TYP stores the reporting rules that are employed to validate a program or plan not in program by the plan design validation tool.

columns.Name: VALD_RPT_TYP_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: RPT_CD
columns.Comments: Reporting code type.

columns.Name: MEANING
columns.Comments: Reporting code meaning.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Reporting code description.

columns.Name: PGM_RQD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Program required flag.

columns.Name: PTIP_RQD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Plan type in program required flag.

columns.Name: PL_TYP_RQD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Plan type required flag.

columns.Name: PLIP_RQD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Plan in program required flag.

columns.Name: PL_RQD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Plan required flag.

columns.Name: PLNIP_RQD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Plan not in program required flag.

columns.Name: OIPL_RQD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Option in plan required flag.

columns.Name: OPT_RQD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Option required flag.

columns.Name: COMP_LVL_CD
columns.Comments: Indicates the compensation level code.

columns.Name: SEQ_NUM
columns.Comments: Sequence number.

columns.Name: ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Enabled flag.

columns.Name: VALD_ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Validation attribute1 to store any additional varchar information.

columns.Name: VALD_ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Validation attribute2 to store any additional varchar2 information.

columns.Name: VALD_ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Validation attribute3 to store additional varchar information.

columns.Name: VALD_NUMBER1
columns.Comments: Validation Number1 to store additional number type information.

columns.Name: VALD_NUMBER2
columns.Comments: Validation Number2 to store additional number type information.

columns.Name: VALD_NUMBER3
columns.Comments: Validation Number3 to store additional number type information.

columns.Name: VALD_DATE1
columns.Comments: Validation Date1 to store additional date type information.

columns.Name: VALD_DATE2
columns.Comments: Validation Date2 to store additional date type information.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_CD
columns.Comments: Display code.

columns.Name: COLOR_CD
columns.Comments: Color code. A hex code which identifies the color to be used while rendering the plan design validation UI.

columns.Name: DTLS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Details flag. Determines if additional drill down data has to be captured for the rule.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
